word.definition: Deleterious is a word used in formal speech and writing to describe something that is damaging or harmful, usually in a subtle or unexpected way.

sports_fact.text: On June 9, 1973, Secretariat won the Belmont Stakes by 31 lengths to claim the Triple Crown. His time of 2:24 for a mile and a half has never been touched.

quote.text: Night and day, you are the one Only you beneath the moon Under the sun Whether near to me or far It's no matter, darlin', where you are I think of you night and day.
quote.author: Cole Porter

history.text: Abbasid Revolution: Abu Muslim Khorasani begins an open revolt against Umayyad rule, which is carried out under the sign of the Black Standard.
